decoder_heading: Items of personal information to be collected
ident_heading: Items of personal information to be collected
heading_content_part: Items of personal information to be collectedIn the course of using the social login for subscription, Nickname, SNS ID, email address, and Profile Image will be provided (Search email address without saving). Also, email address (ID), nickname, and password will be collected when signing up with email address.In the course of handling events and customer inquiry, email address and event prize shipment information may be additionally collected.

decoder_heading: Items of personal information to be collected
ident_heading: Items of personal information to be collected
heading_content_part: In the course of using services, IP addresses, device information (language, country, etc.), service use records, records of poor use, terminal information, etc. may be automatically generated and collected.

decoder_heading: Personal Information collection methods
ident_heading: Personal Information collection methods
heading_content_part: Personal Information collection methodsThe company collects personal information to provide services in the following manner:Directly collected from the user during the course of subscription and use of PRISM Live StudioProvided from the affiliated partnersCollected through the created information-gathering tools

decoder_heading: Purposes of collecting and using personal information
ident_heading: Purposes of collecting and using personal information
heading_content_part: Purposes of collecting and using personal informationThe company uses the collected information for the following purposes:To help users seamlessly access servicesTo identify users and prevent illegal use of servicesTo create statistical data about service useFor surveys and analysis required to improve servicesFor a lottery and prize shipment of campaigns and eventsTo identify users and respond to an inquiry when a user submits oneTo notify depending on needs, including important notices, etc.

decoder_heading: Purposes of collecting and using personal information
ident_heading: Purposes of collecting and using personal information
heading_content_part: To deliver advertising information such as events

decoder_heading: Sharing and supply of personal information
ident_heading: Sharing and supply of personal information
heading_content_part: Sharing and supply of personal informationIn principle, the company does not provide any external party with the personal information of the user without prior written consent. However, exceptions are as below.If the user agrees in advanceIf under the provisions of the law and regulations

decoder_heading: Rights of users and legal representatives and how to exercise the rights
ident_heading: Rights of users and legal representatives and how to exercise the rights
heading_content_part: Rights of users and legal representatives and how to exercise the rightsUsers and legal representatives may examine or correct their own registered personal information or registered personal information of children under fourteen (14) at any time, and ask to have their account deleted.

decoder_heading: Rights of users and legal representatives and how to exercise the rights
ident_heading: Rights of users and legal representatives and how to exercise the rights
heading_content_part: If the user asks for correction of an error in their personal information, the relevant personal information will not be used or provided until the correction is completed. In addition, if this incorrect personal information was already provided to a third party, we will notify the result of correction to the third party without delay and have it corrected.

decoder_heading: Rights of users and legal representatives and how to exercise the rights
ident_heading: Rights of users and legal representatives and how to exercise the rights
heading_content_part: The company has terminated or deleted personal information upon the request of the users or legal representatives as specified in the â€œPeriod of retention and use of personal informationâ€, and also processed not to browse or use for other purposes.

decoder_heading: The purpose of the use of cookies
ident_heading: The purpose of the use of cookies
heading_content_part: The purpose of the use of cookiesThey are used to identify the visit and use types and the volume of users of the services and websites that the users have used, and to provide optimized information to the users.

decoder_heading: The installation/operation and rejection of cookies
ident_heading: The installation/operation and rejection of cookies
heading_content_part: The installation/operation and rejection of cookiesThe users have the option to set cookies. The users may allow or deny the storage of cookies from the option menu which is available in the browser and OS. However, if they refuse to save cookies, some services requiring login may not be accessible.

decoder_heading: Period of retention and use of personal information
ident_heading: Period of retention and use of personal information
heading_content_part: Period of retention and use of personal informationIn principle, the company will destroy the personal information of users without delay, when purposes of collecting and using personal information have been achieved. However, if there is a need to store it pursuant to the companyâ€™s internal policy or the relevant laws and regulations, it may be kept for a certain period of time.In order to prevent false sign-up or use, the ID and Nickname that were one-way encrypted will be kept for six (6) months.

decoder_heading: Destruction procedures
ident_heading: Destruction procedures
heading_content_part: Destruction procedures and methods of personal informationThe companyâ€™s destruction procedures and methods of personal information are as below:Destruction proceduresAfter the purpose of use is achieved, the information that the user entered for the service use shall be destroyed in accordance with internal policy and the relevant laws and regulations after being stored for a certain period of time. The relevant personal information shall not be used for purposes other than the storage purpose, except in cases according to the law.

decoder_heading: Destruction method
ident_heading: Destruction method
heading_content_part: Destruction methodPersonal information printed on paper shall be destroyed in a shredder, and personal information stored as an electronic file type shall be deleted by using technical methods that will disable the reproduction of the records.
